title: The Shawshank Redemption
desc: After a banker is sentenced to life in Shawshank Prison, he forms an unlikely friendship with a seasoned inmate and clings to hope amid cruelty and corruption.

title: The Godfather
desc: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

title: The Dark Knight
desc: When a menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman, James Gordon and Harvey Dent must work together to put an end to the madness.

title: The Godfather Part II
desc: The early life and career of Vito Corleone in 1920s New York City is portrayed, while his son, Michael, expands and tightens his grip on the family crime syndicate.

title: 12 Angry Men
desc: The jury in a New York City murder trial is frustrated by a single member whose skeptical caution forces them to more carefully consider the evidence before jumping to a hasty verdict.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
desc: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam as they approach Mount Doom with the One Ring.

title: Schindler's List
desc: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce after witnessing their persecution by the Nazis.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
desc: A meek Hobbit from the Shire and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful One Ring and save Middle-earth from the Dark Lord Sauron.

title: Pulp Fiction
desc: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
desc: A bounty-hunting scam joins two men in an uneasy alliance against a third in a race to find a fortune in gold buried in a remote cemetery.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
desc: While Frodo and Sam edge closer to Mordor with the help of the shifty Gollum, the divided fellowship makes a stand against Sauron's new ally, Saruman, and his hordes of Isengard.

title: Forrest Gump
desc: The history of the United States from the 1950s to the '70s unfolds from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75, who yearns to be reunited with his childhood sweetheart.

title: Fight Club
desc: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into much more.

title: Inception
desc: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO, but his tragic past may doom the project and his team to disaster.

title: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back
desc: After the Empire overpowers the Rebel Alliance, Luke Skywalker begins training with Jedi Master Yoda, while Darth Vader and bounty hunter Boba Fett pursue his friends across the galaxy.

title: The Matrix
desc: A computer hacker discovers that his life is nothing more than an elaborate simulation run by an evil AI.

title: Interstellar
desc: In a dystopian future where Earth has become near-uninhabitable, a team of astronauts embark on a mission to find a new home for humanity.

title: GoodFellas
desc: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mafia, covering his relationship with his wife Karen and his mob partners Jimmy Conway and Tommy DeVito.

title: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
desc: A rebellious convict is sent to a psychiatric hospital for evaluation in 1963 Oregon, and encourages his docile companions to take more control of their lives and defy the tyrannical head nurse.

title: Seven
desc: Two detectives try to track down a serial killer who chooses his victims based on the Seven Deadly Sins.

title: It's a Wonderful Life
desc: An angel is sent from Heaven to help a desperately frustrated businessman see the value of his own life.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
desc: A young FBI cadet is aided by a manipulative cannibal killer in her pursuit of a madman who skins his victims.

title: Saving Private Ryan
desc: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of U.S. soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose brothers have been killed in action.

title: Seven Samurai
desc: Farmers from a village exploited by bandits hire a veteran samurai for protection, and he gathers six other samurai to join him.

title: The Green Mile
desc: A death row guard learns that a gentle giant in his charge possesses a mysterious gift.

title: City of God
desc: In the slums of Rio, two kids' paths diverge as one struggles to become a photographer and the other a kingpin.

title: Life Is Beautiful
desc: When an open-minded Jewish waiter and his son become victims of the Holocaust, he uses a perfect mixture of will, humor and imagination to protect his son from the dangers around their camp.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
desc: A cyborg from the future, identical to the one who failed to kill Sarah Connor, must now protect her ten-year-old son John from an even more advanced and powerful cyborg.

title: Back to the Future
desc: Marty McFly, a 17-year-old high school student, is accidentally sent 30 years into the past in a time-traveling DeLorean invented by his close friend, the maverick scientist Doc Brown.

title: Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope
desc: A farmboy joins forces with various allies to save their galaxy from the evil Empire's planet-destroying battle station, while also rescuing the princess leading the rebellion against them.

title: Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair
desc: A female assassin seeks revenge on her former lover and squad members, all of whom left her for dead.

title: Spirited Away
desc: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches and spirits, and where humans are changed into beasts.

title: Gladiator
desc: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

title: The Pianist
desc: During WWII, acclaimed Polish musician Wladyslaw faces various struggles as he loses contact with his family. As the situation worsens, he hides in the ruins of Warsaw in order to survive.

title: Parasite
desc: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.

title: Grave of the Fireflies
desc: A young boy and his little sister struggle to survive in Japan during World War II.

title: Psycho
desc: A secretary on the run for embezzlement takes refuge at a secluded California motel owned by a repressed man and his overbearing mother.

title: Harakiri
desc: When a ronin requesting seppuku at a feudal lord's palace is told of the brutal suicide of another ronin who previously visited, he reveals how their pasts are intertwined - and in doing so challenges the clan's integrity.

title: The Lion King
desc: Lion prince Simba and his father are targeted by his bitter uncle, who wants to ascend the throne himself.

title: The Departed
desc: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in South Boston.

title: Whiplash
desc: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing to realize a student's potential.

title: The Prestige
desc: Two magicians dismantle their lives to outmaneuver each other following a shared tragedy. They chase the ultimate illusion across Victorian London, sacrificing sanity and safety to master a teleportation feat that defies all logic.

title: American History X
desc: A neo-Nazi is released from prison a changed man and hopes to prevent his younger brother from following in his footsteps.

title: Léon: The Professional
desc: When her family is murdered by a group of corrupt officers led by the tyrannical Norman Stansfield, a young 12-year-old girl enlists the help of an Italian-American hitman to seek revenge.

title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
desc: Traveling across the multiverse, Miles Morales meets a new team of Spider-People, made up of heroes from different dimensions. But when the heroes clash over how to deal with a new threat, Miles finds himself at a crossroads.

title: Cinema Paradiso
desc: Salvatore, a famous film director, returns to his hometown for the funeral of the local theater's film projectionist, Alfredo. He reminisces about his life as a young boy falling in love with cinema.

title: Casablanca
desc: A cynical expatriate American cafe owner struggles to decide whether or not to help his former lover and her fugitive husband escape the Nazis in French Morocco.

title: The Intouchables
desc: After he becomes a quadriplegic from a paragliding accident, an aristocrat hires a young man from the projects to be his caregiver.

title: The Usual Suspects
desc: The sole survivor of a pier shoot-out tells the story of how a notorious criminal influenced the events that began with five criminals meeting in a seemingly random police lineup.

title: Django Unchained
desc: With the help of a German bounty-hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal plantation owner in Mississippi.

title: Alien
desc: After investigating a mysterious transmission of unknown origin, the crew of a commercial spacecraft encounters a deadly lifeform.

title: Rear Window
desc: A bored photographer recovering from a broken leg passes the time by watching his neighbors and begins to suspect one of them of murder.

title: Modern Times
desc: The Tramp struggles to live in modern industrial society with the help of a young homeless woman.

title: Once Upon a Time in the West
desc: A mysterious stranger with a harmonica teams up with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow and her land from a ruthless assassin in the employ of a railroad tycoon.

title: City Lights
desc: With the aid of a wealthy erratic tippler, a dewy-eyed tramp who has fallen in love with a blind flower girl accumulates money to be able to help her medically.

title: WALL·E
desc: In a future where humans have temporarily abandoned Earth, a trash-compacting robot falls in love with a flying droid and helps her on her quest to restore hope to mankind.

title: Apocalypse Now
desc: A U.S. Army officer serving in Vietnam is tasked with assassinating a renegade Special Forces Colonel who sees himself as a god.

title: Memento
desc: A former insurance investigator who now suffers from anterograde amnesia uses notes and tattoos to hunt down his wife's murderer.

title: Dune: Part Two
desc: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible fu...

title: Avengers: Infinity War
desc: The Avengers and their allies must be willing to sacrifice all in an attempt to defeat the powerful Thanos before his blitz of devastation and ruin puts an end to the universe.

title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
desc: In 1936, archaeologist Indiana Jones is tasked by Army Intelligence to help locate a legendary ancient power, the Ark of Covenant, before the Nazis get it first.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
desc: Teen Miles Morales becomes the Spider-Man of his universe and must join with five spider-powered individuals from other dimensions to stop a threat for all realities.

title: The Lives of Others
desc: In 1984 East Berlin, an agent of the secret police conducting surveillance on a writer and his lover finds himself becoming increasingly absorbed by their lives.

title: Sunset Boulevard
desc: A screenwriter develops a dangerous relationship with a faded film star determined to make a triumphant return.

title: Witness for the Prosecution
desc: A veteran British barrister must defend his client in a murder trial that has surprise after surprise.

title: Paths of Glory
desc: A colonel defends three of his soldiers in a court-martial after they abandon a suicidal attack.

title: The Shining
desc: A family heads to an isolated hotel for the winter, where a sinister presence influences the father into violence. At the same time, his psychic son sees horrifying forebodings from both the past and the future.

title: The Great Dictator
desc: Dictator Adenoid Hynkel tries to expand his empire while a poor Jewish barber tries to avoid persecution from Hynkel's regime.

title: Inglourious Basterds
desc: In Nazi-occupied France during World War II, a plan to assassinate Nazi leaders by a group of Jewish U.S. soldiers coincides with a theatre owner's vengeful plans for the same.

title: Aliens
desc: Decades after surviving the Nostromo incident, Ellen Ripley is sent out to re-establish contact with a terraforming colony but finds herself battling the Alien Queen and her offspring.

title: 12th Fail
desc: The real-life story of IPS Officer Manoj Kumar Sharma and IRS Officer Shraddha Joshi.

title: High and Low
desc: An executive of a Yokohama shoe company becomes a victim of extortion when his chauffeur's son is kidnapped by mistake and held for ransom.

title: Avengers: Endgame
desc: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War (2018), the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more in order to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance to the universe.

title: Good Will Hunting
desc: A therapist counsels Will Hunting, a janitor with a genius IQ.

title: The Dark Knight Rises
desc: Bane, an imposing terrorist, attacks Gotham City and disrupts its eight-year-long period of peace. This forces Bruce Wayne to come out of hiding and don the cape and cowl of Batman again.

title: Coco
desc: Aspiring musician Miguel, confronted with his family's ancestral ban on music, enters the Land of the Dead to find his great-great-grandfather, a legendary singer.

title: Amadeus
desc: In 18th-century Vienna, court composer Antonio Salieri becomes awed and consumed by envy when the gifted, irreverent Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart bursts onto the imperial music scene.

title: Toy Story
desc: A cowboy doll is profoundly jealous when a new spaceman action figure supplants him as the top toy in a boy's bedroom. When circumstances separate them from their owner, the duo have to put aside their differences to return to him.

title: Your Name.
desc: Two teenagers, a city boy in Tokyo and a girl in rural Japan, mysteriously begin swapping bodies, forging a connection that sends them searching for one another.

title: Das Boot
desc: During World War II, a German U-boat crew embarks on a perilous Atlantic patrol, confronting enemy attacks, isolation, and the crushing strain of life underwater.

title: Braveheart
desc: Scottish warrior William Wallace leads his countrymen in a rebellion to free his homeland from the tyranny of King Edward I of England.

title: Princess Mononoke
desc: After a deadly curse forces him from home, young warrior Ashitaka journeys west and is drawn into a conflict between ancient forest spirits, an iron town, and a wolf-raised girl.

title: Oldboy
desc: After being kidnapped and imprisoned for fifteen years, Oh Dae-Su is released, only to find that he must track down his captor in five days.

title: 3 Idiots
desc: Two friends search for a brilliant, free-spirited classmate whose unconventional approach to engineering school changed their lives and challenged a rigid education system.

title: Dr. Strangelove or: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb
desc: When a rogue U.S. general orders an unauthorized nuclear attack on the Soviet Union, leaders in the War Room race to prevent global catastrophe.

title: American Beauty
desc: A sexually frustrated suburban father has a mid-life crisis after becoming infatuated with his daughter's best friend.

title: Capernaum
desc: While serving a five-year sentence for a violent crime, a 12-year-old boy sues his parents for neglect.

title: Singin' in the Rain
desc: When Hollywood's silent era gives way to talkies, a dashing screen idol and a gifted newcomer navigate romance, rivalry, and the comic chaos of reinventing the movies.

title: Once Upon a Time in America
desc: A former New York gangster returns after decades in exile, confronting the friendships, dreams, and regrets that shaped his rise from street kid to Prohibition-era mobster.

title: Joker
desc: Arthur Fleck, a party clown and a failed stand-up comedian, leads an impoverished life with his ailing mother. However, when society shuns him and brands him as a freak, he decides to embrace the life of chaos in Gotham City.

title: Toy Story 3
desc: As Andy prepares to leave for college, Woody, Buzz and the gang face an uncertain future when a mix-up sends them to a daycare center full of new toys.

title: Star Wars: Episode VI - Return of the Jedi
desc: After rescuing Han Solo from Jabba the Hutt, the Rebel Alliance attempts to destroy the second Death Star while Luke struggles to help Darth Vader back from the dark side.

title: Come and See
desc: After finding a rifle, a Belarusian teenager joins Soviet partisans in World War II and is swept into the harrowing realities of Nazi occupation.

title: Requiem for a Dream
desc: Four Coney Island dreamers chase love, fame, and escape, but addiction and obsession begin to distort their hopes for a better life.

title: Ikiru
desc: An aging Tokyo bureaucrat, shaken by a grave diagnosis, breaks from his hollow routine and searches for meaning, connection, and one worthwhile act.

title: The Hunt
desc: A teacher lives a lonely life, all the while struggling over his son's custody. His life slowly gets better as he finds love and receives good news from his son, but his new luck is about to be brutally shattered by an innocent li...

title: Incendies
desc: Twins journey to the Middle East to discover their family history and fulfill their mother's last wishes.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
desc: When their relationship turns sour, a couple undergoes a medical procedure to have each other erased from their memories forever.

title: The Apartment
desc: A Manhattan insurance clerk tries to rise in his company by letting its executives use his apartment for trysts, but office politics and his own romantic hopes complicate matters.

title: Lawrence of Arabia
desc: The story of T.E. Lawrence, the English officer who successfully united and led the diverse, often warring, Arab tribes during World War I in order to fight the Turks.

title: Heat
desc: A group of high-end professional thieves start to feel the heat from the LAPD when they unknowingly leave a verbal clue at their latest heist.

title: Scarface
desc: In the 1980s, a determined criminal-minded Cuban immigrant becomes the biggest drug smuggler in Miami, and is eventually undone by his own drug addiction.

title: Reservoir Dogs
desc: When a simple jewelry heist goes horribly wrong, the surviving criminals begin to suspect that one of them is a police informant.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
desc: When a mysterious artifact is uncovered on the Moon, a spacecraft manned by two humans and one supercomputer is sent to Jupiter to find its origins.

title: Up
desc: A grumpy old man turns his house into an airship using balloons and flies off to South America with a young stowaway.

title: Double Indemnity
desc: An insurance representative is seduced by a dissatisfied housewife into a scheme of insurance fraud and murder that arouses the suspicion of his colleague, a claims investigator.

title: North by Northwest
desc: A New York City advertising executive goes on the run after being mistaken for a government agent by a group of foreign spies, and falls for a woman whose loyalties he begins to doubt.

title: Like Stars on Earth
desc: A young boy is thought to be nothing but a lazy troublemaker until the new art teacher has the patience and compassion to discover the real problem behind his struggles in school.

title: Full Metal Jacket
desc: A pragmatic U.S. Marine observes the dehumanizing effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow recruits from their brutal boot camp training to the bloody street fighting in Hue.

title: M
desc: When the police in a German city are unable to catch a child-murderer, other criminals join in the manhunt.

title: A Separation
desc: A married couple have to decide whether to improve their daughter's life by moving abroad or to stay in Iran and look after a deteriorating parent with Alzheimer's disease.

title: Amélie
desc: Despite being caught in her imaginative world, young waitress Amelie decides to help people find happiness. Her quest to spread joy leads her on a journey during which she finds true love.

title: Vertigo
desc: A former San Francisco police detective juggles wrestling with his personal demons and becoming obsessed with the hauntingly beautiful woman he has been hired to trail, who may be deeply disturbed.

title: Citizen Kane
desc: Following the death of publishing tycoon Charles Foster Kane, reporters scramble to uncover the meaning of his final utterance: 'Rosebud.'

title: Die Hard
desc: A New York City cop tries to save his wife and several others taken hostage by terrorists during a Christmas party in a Los Angeles skyscraper.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
desc: A widowed lawyer in Depression-era Alabama defends a black man against a false rape charge while teaching his young children about the sad reality of prejudice.

title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
desc: In 1938, after his father goes missing while pursuing the Holy Grail, Indiana Jones finds himself up against the Nazis again to stop them from obtaining its powers.

title: The Sting
desc: Two grifters team up to pull off the ultimate con.

title: I Swear
desc: John Davidson: diagnosed with Tourette's syndrome at a young age which alienated him from his peers, he struggled with a condition few people had witnessed.

title: A Clockwork Orange
desc: Alex DeLarge and his droogs barbarize a decaying near-future.

title: Metropolis
desc: In a futuristic city sharply divided between the working class and the city planners, the son of the city's mastermind falls in love with a working-class prophet who predicts the coming of a savior to mediate their differences.

April 6th, 1917. As an infantry battalion assembles to wage war deep in enemy territory, two soldiers are assigned to race against time and deliver a message that will stop 1,600 men from walking straight into a deadly trap.

title: Snatch
desc: Unscrupulous boxing promoters, violent bookmakers, a Russian gangster, incompetent amateur robbers and supposedly Jewish jewelers fight to track down a priceless stolen diamond.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
desc: Based on the true story of Jordan Belfort, from his rise to a wealthy stock-broker living the high life to his fall involving crime, corruption and the federal government.

title: Attack on Titan: The Last Attack
desc: The fate of the world hangs in the balance as Eren unleashes the ultimate power of the Titans. With a burning determination to eliminate all who threaten Eldia, he leads an unstoppable army of Colossal Titans towards Marley.

title: The Truman Show
desc: An insurance salesman begins to suspect that his whole life is actually some sort of reality TV show.

title: Downfall
desc: Traudl Junge, the final secretary for Adolf Hitler, tells of the Nazi dictator's final days in his Berlin bunker at the end of WWII.

title: L.A. Confidential
desc: As corruption grows in 1950s Los Angeles, three policemen - one strait-laced, one brutal, and one sleazy - investigate a series of murders with their own brand of justice.

title: Dangal
desc: Mahavir Singh Phogat, a former wrestler, decides to fulfill his dream of winning a gold medal for his country by training his daughters for the Commonwealth Games despite the existing social stigmas.

title: Shutter Island
desc: Two US marshals are sent to a mental institution on an inhospitable island in order to investigate the disappearance of a patient.

title: Green Book
desc: A working-class Italian-American bouncer becomes the driver for an African-American classical pianist on a tour of venues through the 1960s American South.

title: Bicycle Thieves
desc: In post-war Italy, a working-class man's bicycle is stolen, endangering his efforts to find work. He and his son set out to find it.

title: Oppenheimer
desc: A dramatization of the life story of J. Robert Oppenheimer, the physicist who had a large hand in the development of the atomic bombs that brought an end to World War II.

title: Judgment at Nuremberg
desc: Fictionalized depiction of the 1947 Judges' Trial, the third of 12 trials of Nazi war criminals conducted by the American occupying forces in Nuremberg, Germany, in which former judges of Nazi Germany were tried for their actions.

title: Batman Begins
desc: After witnessing his parents' death, billionaire Bruce Wayne learns the art of fighting to confront injustice. When he returns to Gotham as Batman, he must stop a secret society that intends to destroy the city.

title: Jurassic Park
desc: An industrialist invites some experts to visit his theme park of cloned dinosaurs. After a power failure, the creatures run loose, putting everyone's lives, including his grandchildren's, in danger.

title: For a Few Dollars More
desc: Two bounty killers with similar intentions but different motivations team up to take down a psychotic Mexican outlaw before he and his gang can carry out an audacious bank robbery.

title: Hamilton
desc: The real life of one of America's foremost founding fathers and first Secretary of the Treasury, Alexander Hamilton. Captured live on Broadway from the Richard Rodgers Theater with the original Broadway cast.

title: Project Hail Mary
desc: A science teacher wakes up alone on a spaceship. As his memory returns, he uncovers a mission to stop a mysterious substance killing Earth's sun, and realizes that an unexpected friendship may be the key.

title: Taxi Driver
desc: A mentally unstable veteran works as a nighttime taxi driver in New York City, where the perceived decadence and sleaze fuels his urge for violent action.

title: Some Like It Hot
desc: After two male musicians witness a mob hit, they flee the state in an all-female band disguised as women, but further complications set in.

title: There Will Be Blood
desc: A story of family, religion, hatred, oil and madness, focusing on a turn-of-the-century prospector in the early days of the business.

title: The Father
desc: A man refuses all assistance from his daughter as he ages. When he tries to understand what is happening around him, he begins to doubt his loved ones, his own mind and even the fabric of his reality.

title: The Kid
desc: The Tramp cares for an abandoned child, but events put their relationship in jeopardy.

title: All About Eve
desc: A seemingly timid but secretly ruthless ingénue insinuates herself into the lives of an aging Broadway star and her circle of theater friends.

title: The Sixth Sense
desc: After being shot by a resentful former patient whom he failed to help, a Philadelphia child psychologist seeks redemption by treating a young boy with a disturbing secret.

title: Ran
desc: In Medieval Japan, an elderly warlord retires, handing over his empire to his three sons. However, he vastly underestimates how the new-found power will corrupt them and cause them to turn on each other...and him.

title: Casino
desc: In Las Vegas, two best friends--a casino executive and a Mafia enforcer--compete for a gambling empire and a fast-living, fast-loving socialite.

title: The Thing
desc: A research team in Antarctica is hunted by a shape-shifting alien that assumes the appearance of its victims.

title: No Country for Old Men
desc: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon the aftermath of a drug deal gone wrong and over two million dollars in cash near the Rio Grande.

title: Prisoners
desc: A desperate father takes the law into his own hands after police fail to find two kidnapped girls.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
desc: The story involves Maverick confronting his past while training a group of younger Top Gun graduates, including the son of his deceased best friend, for a dangerous mission.

title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
desc: After waking from a four-year coma, a former assassin wreaks vengeance on the team of assassins who betrayed her.

title: Pan's Labyrinth
desc: In 1944 Francoist Spain, an imaginative young girl meets a faun who tells her she's a princess and that she must prove her worthiness by completing three dangerous tasks.

title: Unforgiven
desc: Retired Old West gunslinger Will Munny reluctantly takes on one last job to avenge an injustice with the help of his old partner and a young would-be gunman calling himself "The Schofield Kid".

title: A Beautiful Mind
desc: A mathematical genius, John Nash made an astonishing discovery early in his career and stood on the brink of international acclaim. But Nash soon found himself on a harrowing journey of self-discovery.

title: Howl's Moving Castle
desc: When an unconfident young woman is cursed with an old body by a spiteful witch, her only chance of breaking the spell lies with a self-indulgent yet insecure young wizard and his companions in his legged, walking castle.

title: The Treasure of the Sierra Madre
desc: Two down-on-their-luck Americans searching for work in 1920s Mexico convince an old prospector to help them mine for gold in the Sierra Madre Mountains.

title: Finding Nemo
desc: After his son is captured in the Great Barrier Reef and taken to Sydney, a timid clownfish sets out on a journey to bring him home.

title: Klaus
desc: A simple act of kindness always sparks another, even in a frozen, faraway place. When Smeerensburg's new postman, Jesper, befriends toymaker Klaus, their gifts melt an age-old feud and deliver a sleigh full of holiday traditions.

title: Yojimbo
desc: A crafty ronin comes to a town divided by two criminal gangs and decides to play them against each other to free the town.

title: The Elephant Man
desc: A Victorian surgeon rescues a heavily-disfigured and mistreated young man working as a sideshow freak, who gradually reveals his capacity for kindness, intelligence and sophistication.

title: The Great Escape
desc: Allied officers in a German POW camp during World War II make a daring plan for a mass escape.

title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu No Yaiba Infinity Castle
desc: The Demon Slayer Corps are drawn into the Infinity Castle, where Tanjiro and the Hashira face terrifying Upper Rank demons in a desperate fight as the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji begins.

title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
desc: King Arthur and his Knights of the Round Table embark on a surreal, low-budget search for the Holy Grail, encountering many, very silly obstacles.

title: Dial M for Murder
desc: A London playboy plots the perfect murder of his rich, unfaithful wife.

title: The Secret in Their Eyes
desc: A retired legal counselor writes a novel hoping to find closure for one of his past unresolved homicide cases and for his unreciprocated love with his superior--both of which still haunt him decades later.

title: Gone with the Wind
desc: A sheltered and manipulative Southern belle and a roguish profiteer face off in a turbulent romance as the society around them crumbles with the end of slavery and is rebuilt during the Civil War and Reconstruction periods.

title: Lock, Stock and Two Smoking Barrels
desc: When four small-time criminals lose a rigged poker game against a London kingpin, he gives them one week to settle their enormous debt.

title: Chinatown
desc: A private detective hired to expose an adulterer in 1930s Los Angeles finds himself caught up in a web of deceit, corruption, and murder.

title: The Best of Youth
desc: An Italian epic that follows the lives of two brothers from the 1960s to the 2000s.

title: V for Vendetta
desc: A young woman living in a dystopian society meets a shadowy freedom fighter who is plotting to overthrow their tyrannical government.

title: Catch Me If You Can
desc: A runaway teenager lives an exciting life by forging checks and impersonating several professions, but his fraudulent activities soon attract the attention of the FBI.

title: Inside Out
desc: After a young girl is uprooted from her Midwest life and moved to San Francisco, her emotions conflict on how best to navigate her new reality.

title: Trainspotting
desc: Renton, deeply immersed in the Edinburgh drug scene, tries to clean up and get out despite the allure of drugs and the influence of friends.

title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
desc: A mother personally challenges the local authorities to solve her daughter's murder when they fail to catch the culprit.

title: Dead Poets Society
desc: Maverick teacher John Keating returns in 1959 to the prestigious New England boys' boarding school where he was once a star student, using poetry to embolden his pupils to new heights of self-expression.

title: Rashomon
desc: Three parties and a witness have four versions of a rape/murder in ninth-century Japan.

title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
desc: British POWs are forced to build a railway bridge across the river Kwai for their Japanese captors in occupied Burma, not knowing that the allied forces are planning a daring commando raid through the jungle to destroy it.

title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2
desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione set out on a quest to eliminate the remaining horcruxes. On the other hand, the students and teachers must unite to defend Hogwarts against Lord Voldemort and his army.

title: The Wild Robot
desc: A sentient robot stranded on an uninhabited island raises an orphaned gosling while trying to fit in with the local wildlife.

title: Barry Lyndon
desc: An Irish rogue wins the heart of a rich widow and assumes her dead husband's aristocratic position in 18th-century England.

title: Ben-Hur
desc: A Jewish prince is betrayed and sent into slavery by a Roman friend in 1st-century Jerusalem, but it's not long before he regains his freedom and comes back for revenge.

title: Warrior
desc: The youngest son of an alcoholic former boxer returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament - a path that puts the fighter on a collision course with his estranged, older brother.

title: Fargo
desc: A car salesman's inept crime falls apart due to his and his henchmen's bungling and the persistent police work of a dogged detective.

title: Hacksaw Ridge
desc: World War II American Army Medic Desmond T. Doss, serving during the Battle of Okinawa, refuses to kill people and becomes the first man in American history to receive the Medal of Honor without firing a shot.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
desc: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners, a psychotic worshipper and a drifter named Max.

title: Million Dollar Baby
desc: Frankie, an ill-tempered old coach, reluctantly agrees to train aspiring boxer Maggie. Impressed with her determination and talent, he helps her become the best and the two soon form a close bond.

title: Children of Heaven
desc: After a boy loses his sister's pair of shoes, he goes on a series of adventures in order to find them. When he can't, he tries a new way to "win" a new pair.

title: My Neighbor Totoro
desc: When two girls move to the country to be near their ailing mother, they have adventures with the wondrous forest spirits who live nearby.

title: Ratatouille
desc: A rat who can cook makes an unusual alliance with a young kitchen worker at a famous Paris restaurant.

title: Raging Bull
desc: The life of boxer Jake LaMotta, whose violence and temper that led him to the top in the ring destroyed his life outside of it.

title: Gran Torino
desc: After a Hmong teenager tries to steal his prized 1972 Gran Torino, a disgruntled, prejudiced Korean War veteran seeks to redeem both the boy and himself.

title: 12 Years a Slave
desc: In the antebellum United States, Solomon Northup, a free black man from upstate New York, is abducted and sold into slavery.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
desc: A writer encounters the owner of an aging high-class hotel, who tells him of his early years serving as a lobby boy in the hotel's glorious years under an exceptional concierge.

title: Memories of Murder
desc: In a small Korean province in 1986, two detectives struggle with the case of multiple young women being found raped and murdered by an unknown culprit.

title: How to Train Your Dragon
desc: A hapless young Viking who aspires to hunt dragons becomes the unlikely friend of a young dragon himself, and learns there may be more to the creatures than he assumed.

title: Before Sunrise
desc: A young man and woman meet on a train in Europe, and wind up spending one evening together in Vienna. Unfortunately, both know that this will probably be their only night together.

title: Blade Runner
desc: A blade runner must pursue and terminate four replicants who stole a ship in space and have returned to Earth to find their creator.

title: Monsters, Inc.
desc: Two monsters whose job is to make human children scream accidentally let a little girl into their world and must now protect her from their own kind to return her home unscathed.

title: Gone Girl
desc: The husband of a missing woman becomes the main suspect in her disappearance.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
desc: With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help. When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear.

title: Jaws
desc: When a massive killer shark unleashes chaos on a beach community off Long Island, it's up to the local police chief, a marine biologist, and an old seafarer to hunt the beast down.

title: Ford v Ferrari
desc: American car designer Carroll Shelby and driver Ken Miles battle corporate interference and the laws of physics to build a revolutionary race car for Ford in order to defeat Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans in 1966.

title: In the Name of the Father
desc: An Irish man's coerced confession to an I.R.A. bombing he did not commit results in the imprisonment of his father as well. Meanwhile, a British lawyer fights to clear their names and free them.

title: Wild Tales
desc: Six short stories that explore the extremities of human behavior involving people in distress.

title: The Gold Rush
desc: A prospector goes to the Klondike during the 1890s gold rush in hopes of making his fortune, and is smitten with a girl he sees in a dance hall.

title: Sherlock Jr.
desc: A film projectionist longs to be a detective, and puts his meagre skills to work when he is framed by a rival for stealing his girlfriend's father's pocketwatch.

title: Mary and Max
desc: In 1976 Melbourne, a lonely 8-year-old girl strikes up a correspondence with an unlikely pen pal: a severely obese 44-year-old New Yorker with Asperger's syndrome.

title: The Deer Hunter
desc: The lives of a group of friends are forever changed by the Vietnam War.

title: The Wages of Fear
desc: In a decrepit South American village, four men are hired to transport an urgent nitroglycerine shipment without the equipment that would make it safe.

title: The Chaos Class Failed the Class
desc: A group of students have failed their exams and must return for another year. Distracting them all is a new young female teacher, who they try out their usual tricks on.

title: Chainsaw Man - The Movie: Reze Arc
desc: A direct sequel to the first season of the series "Chainsaw Man", featuring Denji, a young man who co-exists with a chainsaw demon. Denji encounters a new romantic interest, but will his involvement place them both in danger?

title: The General
desc: After being rejected by the Confederate military, not realizing it was due to his crucial civilian role, an engineer must single-handedly recapture his beloved locomotive after it is seized by Union spies and return it through ene...

title: Logan
desc: In a future where mutants are nearly extinct, an elderly and weary Logan leads a quiet life. But when Laura, a mutant child pursued by scientists, comes to him for help, he must get her to safety.

title: Rocky
desc: A small-time Philadelphia boxer gets a supremely rare chance to fight the world heavyweight champion in a bout in which he strives to go the distance for his self-respect.

title: A Silent Voice: The Movie
desc: A deaf girl, Shoko, is bullied by the popular Shoya. As Shoya continues to bully Shoko, the class turns its back on him. Shoko transfers and Shoya grows up as an outcast. Alone and depressed, the regretful Shoya finds Shoko to mak...

title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
desc: An intrepid blacksmith teams up with an eccentric pirate captain to save his love from an undead pirate crew.

title: Mr. Smith Goes to Washington
desc: A naive youth leader is appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate. His idealistic plans promptly collide with corruption at home and subterfuge from his hero in Washington, but he tries to forge ahead despite attacks on his c...

title: Tokyo Story
desc: An old couple visit their children and grandchildren in the city, but receive little attention.

title: La haine
desc: 24 hours in the lives of three young men in the French suburbs the day after a violent riot.

title: Spotlight
desc: The true story of how the Boston Globe uncovered the massive scandal of child molestation and cover-up within the local Catholic Archdiocese, shaking the entire Catholic Church to its core.

title: On the Waterfront
desc: An ex-prize fighter turned New Jersey longshoreman struggles to stand up to his corrupt union bosses, including his older brother, as he starts to connect with the grieving sister of one of the syndicate's victims.

title: The Sound of Music
desc: A young novice is sent by her convent in 1930s Austria to become a governess to the seven children of a widowed naval officer.

title: Wild Strawberries
desc: After living a life marked by coldness, an aging professor is forced to confront the emptiness of his existence.

title: Jai Bhim
desc: When a tribal man is arrested for a case of alleged theft, his wife turns to a human-rights lawyer to help bring justice.

title: The Terminator
desc: A cyborg assassin from the future attempts to find and kill a young woman who is destined to give birth to a warrior that will lead a resistance to save humankind from extinction.

title: Maharaja
desc: A barber seeks vengeance after his home is burglarized, cryptically telling police his "lakshmi" has been taken, leaving them uncertain if it's a person or object. His quest to recover the elusive "lakshmi" unfolds.

title: The Third Man
desc: Pulp novelist Holly Martins travels to shadowy, mystifying post-war Vienna only to find himself investigating the mysterious sudden death of old friend Harry Lime.

title: The Best Years of Our Lives
desc: Three WWII veterans return home forever changed and find it difficult to adjust to their new realities.

title: The Big Lebowski
desc: Jeff "The Dude" Lebowski, mistaken for a millionaire of the same name, seeks restitution for his ruined rug and enlists his bowling buddies to help get it.

title: Before Sunset
desc: Nine years after Jesse and Celine first met, they encounter each other again on the French leg of Jesse's book tour.

title: The Incredibles
desc: While trying to lead a quiet suburban life, a family of undercover superheroes are forced into action to save the world.

title: Room
desc: A little boy is held captive in a room with his mother since his birth, so he has never known the world outside.

title: Hachi: A Dog's Tale
desc: Professor Wilson discovers a lost Akita puppy on his way home. Despite objections from his wife, Hachi endears himself to the family and grows to be Parker's loyal companion. As their bond grows deeper, a beautiful relationship un...

title: The Seventh Seal
desc: A knight returning to Sweden after the Crusades seeks answers about life, death, and the existence of God as he plays chess against the Grim Reaper during the Black Plague.

title: Hotel Rwanda
desc: Paul Rusesabagina, a hotel manager, houses over a thousand Tutsi refugees during their struggle against the Hutu militia in Rwanda, Africa.

title: Platoon
desc: Chris Taylor, a neophyte recruit in Vietnam, finds himself caught in a battle of wills between two sergeants, one good and the other evil. A shrewd examination of the brutality of war and the duality of man in conflict.

title: The Exorcist
desc: When a mysterious entity possesses a young girl, her mother seeks the help of two Catholic priests to save her life.

title: The Iron Giant
desc: A young boy befriends a giant robot from outer space that a paranoid government agent wants to destroy.

title: Rush
desc: James Hunt and Niki Lauda, two extremely skilled Formula One racers, have an intense rivalry with each other. However, it is their enmity that pushes them to their limits.

title: The Wizard of Oz
desc: Young Dorothy Gale and her dog Toto are swept away by a tornado from their Kansas farm to the magical Land of Oz and embark on a quest with three new friends to see the Wizard, who can return her to her home and fulfill the others...

title: Stand by Me
desc: A writer recounts a childhood journey with his friends to view the body of a boy who went missing in the woods.

title: The Battle of Algiers
desc: In the 1950s, fear and violence escalate as the people of Algiers fight for independence from the French government.

title: My Father and My Son
desc: The family of a left-wing journalist is torn apart after the military coup of Turkey in 1980.

title: The Passion of Joan of Arc
desc: In 1431, Jeanne d'Arc is placed on trial on charges of heresy, and the ecclesiastical jurists attempt to force her to recant her claims of holy visions.

title: The Handmaiden
desc: In 1930s Korea, a girl is hired as a handmaiden to a Japanese heiress who lives a secluded life on a countryside estate. But the maid has a secret: She is a pickpocket recruited by a swindler to help seduce the Lady and steal her ...

title: Drishyam
desc: A man goes to extreme lengths to save his family from punishment after the family commits an accidental crime.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur
desc: A clash between Sultan and Shahid Khan leads to the expulsion of Khan from Wasseypur, and ignites a deadly blood feud spanning three generations.

title: Obsession
desc: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

title: Rocketry: The Nambi Effect
desc: The story of Indian Space Research Organization scientist Nambi Narayanan, who was framed for being a spy and arrested in 1994.

title: To Be or Not to Be
desc: During the German occupation of Poland, an acting troupe becomes embroiled in a Polish soldier's efforts to track down a German spy.

title: The Red Shoes
desc: A young ballet dancer is torn between the man she loves and her pursuit to become a prima ballerina.

title: Paper Moon
desc: During the Great Depression, a con man finds himself saddled with a young girl who may or may not be his daughter, and the two forge an unlikely partnership.

title: All Quiet on the Western Front
desc: A German youth eagerly enters World War I, but his enthusiasm wanes as he gets a firsthand view of the horror.

title: The Grapes of Wrath
desc: An Oklahoma family, driven off their farm by the poverty and hopelessness of the Dust Bowl, joins the westward migration to California, suffering the misfortunes of the homeless in the Great Depression.

title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance
desc: A senator returns to a Western town for the funeral of an old friend and tells the story of his origins.

title: It Happened One Night
desc: A rogue reporter trailing a runaway heiress for a big story joins her on a bus heading from Florida to New York and they end up stuck with each other when the bus leaves them behind at one of the stops along the way.

title: Network
desc: A television network cynically exploits a deranged former anchor's ravings and revelations about mass media for its own profit, but finds that his message may be difficult to control.

title: Paris, Texas
desc: Travis Henderson, an aimless drifter who has been missing for four years, wanders out of the desert and must reconnect with society, himself, his life, and his family.

title: Rebecca
desc: A self-conscious woman juggles adjusting to her new role as an aristocrat's wife and avoiding being intimidated by his first wife's spectral presence.

title: Cool Hand Luke
desc: A laid-back Southern man is sentenced to two years in a rural prison, but refuses to conform.

title: White Heat
desc: A psychopathic criminal with a mother complex makes a daring break from prison and leads his old gang in a chemical plant payroll heist.

title: Dances with Wolves
desc: A lieutenant assigned to a remote Civil War outpost starts questioning his purpose after making contact with a neighboring Sioux settlement.

title: Scent of a Woman
desc: A young prep student takes a job as an assistant to a blind, irritable, retired Army lieutenant colonel over Thanksgiving weekend.

title: The Help
desc: An aspiring author during the civil rights movement of the 1960s decides to write a book detailing the African American maids' point of view on the white families for which they work, and the hardships they go through on a daily b...

title: Ace in the Hole
desc: Hoping to rekindle his dormant career, former journalist Chuck Tatum, now working for a local newspaper, exploits a story about trading post owner Leo Minosa who's trapped in a cave, but rescue efforts soon blossom into a media ci...

title: Inherit the Wind
desc: Based on a real-life case in 1925; two great lawyers argue the case for, and against, a Tennessee science teacher accused of the crime of teaching Darwin's theory of evolution.

title: Aladdin
desc: A kind-hearted street urchin and a power-hungry Grand Vizier vie for a magic lamp that has the power to make their deepest wishes come true.

title: Into the Wild
desc: After graduating from Emory University, top student and athlete Christopher McCandless abandons his possessions, gives his entire $24,000 savings account to charity and hitchhikes to Alaska to live in the wilderness.

title: Groundhog Day
desc: A curmudgeonly weatherman finds himself stuck in a time loop and is forced to relive the same day over and over again.

title: Beauty and the Beast
desc: A prince cursed to spend his days as a hideous monster sets out to regain his humanity by earning a young woman's love.

title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
desc: The Bride continues her quest for vengeance, tracking the remaining Deadly Viper assassins and closing in on the man who betrayed her.

title: Gandhi
desc: The life of the lawyer who became the famed leader of the Indian revolts against the British rule through his philosophy of nonviolent protest.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
desc: A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior with plans to purge the universe.

title: Fail Safe
desc: A technical malfunction sends American bombers to Moscow to deliver a nuclear attack. Can all-out war be averted?

title: Roman Holiday
desc: A bored and sheltered princess escapes her guardians and falls in love with an American newsman in Rome.

title: Dog Day Afternoon
desc: Three amateur robbers plan to hold up a Brooklyn bank. A nice, simple robbery: Walk in, take the money, and run. Unfortunately, the supposedly uncomplicated heist suddenly becomes a bizarre nightmare as everything that could go wr...

title: The Princess Bride
desc: A bedridden boy's grandfather reads him the story of a farmboy-turned-pirate who encounters numerous obstacles, enemies and allies in his quest to be reunited with his true love.

title: Monty Python's Life of Brian
desc: Born on the original Christmas day in the stable next door to Jesus Christ, Brian of Nazareth spends his life being mistaken for the messiah.

title: Lion
desc: A five-year-old Indian boy is adopted by an Australian couple after getting lost hundreds of kilometers from home. 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family.

title: Song of the Sea
desc: Ben, a young Irish boy and his little sister, Saoirse, a girl who can turn into a seal, go on an adventure to free the fairies and save the spirit world.

title: Soul
desc: Joe is a middle-school band teacher whose life hasn't quite gone the way he expected. His true passion is jazz. But when he travels to another realm to help someone find their passion, he soon discovers what it means to have soul.

title: Rosemary's Baby
desc: A young woman suspects her neighbors have sinister plans for her pregnancy.

title: Anatomy of a Murder
desc: An upstate Michigan lawyer defends a soldier who claims he killed an innkeeper due to temporary insanity after the victim raped his wife. What is the truth and will he win his case?

title: JFK
desc: New Orleans District Attorney Jim Garrison discovers there's more to the Kennedy assassination than the official story.

title: Brief Encounter
desc: Meeting a stranger in a railway station, a woman is tempted to cheat on her husband.

title: A Christmas Carol
desc: Ebenezer Scrooge, a curmudgeonly, miserly businessman, has no time for sentimentality and largely views Christmas as a waste of time. However, this Christmas Eve, he will be visited by three spirits who will show him the error of ...

title: A Woman Under the Influence
desc: Although wife and mother Mabel is loved by her husband Nick, her mental illness places a strain on the marriage.

title: Slumdog Millionaire
desc: When a teenager from the slums of Mumbai is interrogated about his suspicious performance on a quiz show, he revisits various events from his past to explain how he knew all the answers.

title: La La Land
desc: When Sebastian, a pianist, and Mia, an actress, follow their passion and achieve success in their respective fields, they find themselves torn between their love for each other and their careers.

title: Casino Royale
desc: After earning a licence to kill, secret agent James Bond sets out on his first mission as 007. Bond must defeat a private banker funding terrorists in a high-stakes game of poker at Casino Royale, in Montenegro.

title: What Ever Happened to Baby Jane?
desc: A former vaudeville child star torments her paraplegic sister, who eclipsed her as a movie star, in their decaying Hollywood mansion while desperately clinging to hopes of a comeback.

title: Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid
desc: In 1890s Wyoming, Butch Cassidy and The Sundance Kid lead a band of outlaws. When a train robbery goes wrong, they find themselves on the run with a posse hard on their heels..

title: The Ox-Bow Incident
desc: Walter Van Tilburg Clark's novel inspires an account of a lynch mob that seeks revenge for a rancher's murder.

title: The Shop Around the Corner
desc: Two employees at a gift shop can barely stand each other, without realizing that they are falling in love through the post as each other's anonymous pen pal.

title: The Imitation Game
desc: During World War II, the English mathematical genius Alan Turing tries to crack the German Enigma code with help from fellow mathematicians while attempting to come to terms with his troubled private life.

title: The Martian
desc: An astronaut stranded on Mars must rely on his ingenuity to survive and arrange a potential rescue.

title: Secrets & Lies
desc: Following the death of her adoptive parents, a successful young black optometrist establishes contact with her biological mother -- a lonely white factory worker living in poverty in East London.

title: The Pursuit of Happyness
desc: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.

title: Dune: Part One
desc: Paul Atreides arrives on Arrakis after his father accepts the stewardship of the dangerous planet. However, chaos ensues after a betrayal as forces clash to control melange, a precious resource.

title: Donnie Darko
desc: After narrowly escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a man in a large rabbit suit who manipulates him to commit a series of crimes.

title: Black Swan
desc: An insecure ballerina finally gets the role she has always dreamed of, but as the pressures mount her line between reality and illusion starts to blur.

title: The Avengers
desc: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team if they are going to stop the mischievous Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.

title: Magnolia
desc: An epic mosaic of interrelated characters search for love, forgiveness and meaning in the San Fernando Valley.

title: The Bourne Ultimatum
desc: Jason Bourne dodges a ruthless C.I.A. official and his Agents from a new assassination program while searching for the origins of his life as a trained killer.

title: Rain Man
desc: After a selfish L.A. yuppie learns his estranged father left a fortune to an autistic-savant brother in Ohio that he didn't know existed, he absconds with his brother and sets out across the country, hoping to gain a larger inheri...

title: The King's Speech
desc: The story of King George VI, his unexpected ascension to the throne of the British Empire in 1936, and the speech therapist who helped the unsure monarch overcome his stammer.

title: The Straight Story
desc: Alvin Straight, a 73-year-old, learns that his estranged brother, Lyle is critically ill. Unable to drive, Alvin embarks on a journey from Iowa to Mt. Zion by riding a lawn mower.

title: Zootopia
desc: In a city of anthropomorphic animals, a rookie bunny cop and a cynical con artist fox must work together to uncover a conspiracy.

title: Young Frankenstein
desc: An American grandson of the infamous scientist, struggling to prove that his grandfather was not as insane as people believe, is invited to Transylvania, where he discovers the process that reanimates a dead body.

title: Kind Hearts and Coronets
desc: A distant poor relative of the Duke D'Ascoyne plots to inherit the title by murdering the eight other heirs who stand ahead of him in the line of succession.

title: Blade Runner 2049
desc: Young Blade Runner K's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former Blade Runner Rick Deckard, who's been missing for thirty years.

title: Sling Blade
desc: Karl Childers, a simple man hospitalized since his childhood murder of his mother and her lover, is released to start a new life in a small town.

title: Mystic River
desc: The tragic murder of a 19-year-old girl reunites three childhood friends still living in Boston--the victim's gangster father, a detective, and the disturbed man they both suspect of killing her.

title: Man on Fire
desc: In Mexico City, a former CIA operative swears vengeance on those who committed an unspeakable act against the family he was hired to protect.

title: The Hurricane
desc: The story of Rubin 'Hurricane' Carter, a boxer wrongly imprisoned for murder, and the people who aided in his fight to prove his innocence.

title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided by eccentric hacker Lisbeth Salander in his search for a woman who has been missing for 40 years.

title: Inside Man
desc: A police detective, a bank robber and a high-power broker enter high-stakes negotiations after the criminal's brilliant heist spirals into a hostage situation.

title: Skyfall
desc: James Bond's loyalty to M is tested when her past comes back to haunt her. When MI6 comes under attack, 007 must track down and destroy the threat, no matter how personal the cost.

title: Die Hard with a Vengeance
desc: John McClane is forced out of suspension to play a game of "Simon Says" by a terrorist who has planted bombs all around New York City and will detonate them if McClane doesn't do what he says.

title: Ocean's Eleven
desc: A thief and his team of associates plan a sophisticated heist to rob three Las Vegas casinos at the same time.

title: Taken
desc: A retired CIA agent travels across Europe and relies on his old skills to save his estranged daughter, who has been kidnapped while on a trip to Paris.

title: Iron Man
desc: After being held captive in an Afghan cave, billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.

title: A Bronx Tale
desc: An intense drama about a boy torn between his tough, hard-working father and a violent yet charismatic crime boss.

title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
desc: A pair of charismatic seniors take socially awkward Charlie under their wing.

title: Blood Diamond
desc: A fisherman, a smuggler, and a syndicate of businessmen match wits over the possession of a priceless diamond.

title: Dallas Buyers Club
desc: In 1985 Dallas, electrician and hustler Ron Woodroof works around the system to help AIDS patients get the medication they need after he is diagnosed with the disease.

title: Deadpool
desc: A wisecracking mercenary gets experimented on and becomes immortal yet hideously scarred, and sets out to track down the man who ruined his looks.

title: The Batman
desc: When a sadistic serial killer begins murdering key political figures in Gotham, the Batman is forced to investigate the city's hidden corruption and question his family's involvement.

title: Killers of the Flower Moon
desc: When oil is discovered in 1920s Oklahoma under Osage Nation land, the Osage people are murdered one by one - until the FBI steps in to unravel the mystery.

title: Training Day
desc: A rookie cop spends his first day as a Los Angeles narcotics officer with a rogue detective who isn't what he appears to be.
In the ancient battle of Thermopylae, King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fight against Xerxes and his massive Persian army.

title: Lone Survivor
desc: Marcus Luttrell and his team set out on a mission to capture or kill notorious Taliban leader Ahmad Shah, in late June 2005. Marcus and his team are left to fight for their lives in one of the most valiant efforts of modern warfare.

title: Birdman or (The Unexpected Virtue of Ignorance)
desc: A washed-up superhero actor attempts to revive his fading career by writing, directing, and starring in a Broadway production.

title: Crash
desc: Racial tensions collide in a collection of intertwined stories involving residents of Los Angeles.

title: Philadelphia
desc: When a man with HIV is fired by his law firm because of his condition, he hires a homophobic small-time lawyer as the only willing advocate for a wrongful dismissal suit.

title: Speed
desc: An extortionist bomber rigs a Los Angeles city bus to explode if its speed drops below 50 mph, forcing a young cop and a female passenger to keep it moving and save everyone on board.

title: Cinderella Man
desc: The true story of James J. Braddock, a supposedly washed-up boxer, who returned to the spotlight to win the heavyweight championship of the world.

title: The Bourne Supremacy
desc: When Jason Bourne is framed for a CIA operation gone awry, he is forced to resume his former life as a trained assassin to survive.

title: Sherlock Holmes
desc: Detective Sherlock Holmes and his stalwart partner Watson engage in a battle of wits and brawn with a nemesis whose plot is a threat to all of England.

title: The Life of David Gale
desc: A man against capital punishment is accused of murdering a fellow activist and is sent to death row.

title: Coach Carter
desc: Controversy surrounds high school basketball coach Ken Carter after he benches his entire team for breaking their academic contract with him.

title: Iron Man 3
desc: When Tony Stark's world is torn apart by a formidable terrorist called the Mandarin, he starts an odyssey of rebuilding and retribution.

title: The Fault in Our Stars
desc: Hazel and Gus are teenagers who meet at a cancer support group and fall in love. They both share the same acerbic wit and a love of books, especially "An Imperial Affliction", so they embark on a journey to visit an author in Amst...

title: The Hurt Locker
desc: During the Iraq War, a Sergeant recently assigned to an army bomb squad is put at odds with his squad mates due to his maverick way of handling his work.
